title: String Duper
description: Adds back the functionallity of string duping which mojang removed in older updates.
body:
# String Duper
This mod is pretty simple. All it does is restore back string duping.
You can toggle it on and off in modmenus settings if installed and it will by default be turned on. I hope you guys like this mod I was originally going to make it after the update that removed string duping but I forgot. :)
